status: protocol frozen; execution-specific hashes and values must be bound before replay
classification: development replay of frozen V7 compiler artifacts under V8 local retrieval/render code; not an independent benchmark score
purpose: isolate generic local retrieval and rendering changes from hosted compiler output

before_protocol_freeze: do not inspect benchmark questions or answers
do not inspect or use the V7 score
content_review_policy.human_tuning_from_replay_failures: allowed only on the already-consumed dev42 development split and must remain generic

required_execution_bindings: V7 source archive path and SHA-256
V8 source archive path and SHA-256
clean harness commit and source-tree SHA-256
ordered dev42 question-ID manifest path and SHA-256
V7 database SHA-256 after the producer is stopped and WAL checkpointed
replay database SHA-256 before first V8 open and after local migration
exact V7 compiler fingerprint from terminal current-source jobs
V7 compiler model, provider, reasoning, prompt version, schema version, and route policy
fresh V8 output project name and previously nonexistent output paths
server and harness commands including top-k, cutoffs, workers, render budget, and coalescing
counts of complete and partial V7 compiler jobs with content-free partial reasons
prediction manifest SHA-256 frozen before any optional answerer/judge phase

namespace_rules.project_name: must be new; it isolates output files only
namespace_rules.run_id: must equal the V7 producer run ID
namespace_rules.ingestion_checkpoints: copy only complete _ingestion_*.json files into the fresh V8 prediction directory
namespace_rules.prediction_files: must not be copied or pre-created
namespace_rules.risk: a new run ID selects empty database scopes and invalidates the replay

runtime_guards.mutations: add, finalize, and delete rejected; no update or backfill route exists
runtime_guards.search_precondition: every registered current source in the requested scope has a complete or partial job under the explicitly declared fingerprint
runtime_guards.partial_job: accepted as terminal and disclosed; raw-source fallback remains available
runtime_guards.diagnostics: content-free readiness is exposed at /replay/diagnostics?user_id=... and in direct search query_debug

harness_rules.phase: predict-only ingest-checkpoint resume plus fresh search
harness_rules.dataset: local hash-pinned dev42 materialization; no download
harness_rules.external_network: deny or route to a closed proxy while exempting localhost
harness_rules.top_k_and_cutoffs: must match the bound V7 configuration
harness_rules.prediction_directory: fresh and isolated from V7 and all prior V8 attempts

audit_and_label_rules: verify all 42 copied ingestion checkpoints before server start
verify zero normal prediction JSON files before harness start
verify all 42 scopes are replay-ready before harness start
verify the replay database message, session, compiler-job, claim, entity, relation, and usage counts did not change across prediction
verify no compiler cache or compiler usage sidecar was created by replay
audit exactly 42 fresh prediction files and freeze their manifest before optional evaluation
report complete and partial producer-job counts
label any later score V8 local retrieval/render over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed dev42
do not present the replay as a fresh end-to-end V8 compiler run, an untouched result, or a third-party reproduction
